-- This page contains a table of all soft redirect templates and their -- redirects. Templates names are capitalized, and the Template: prefix is -- removed. Templates are grouped with the main template first, followed by -- its redirects.
return { ["Soft redirect"] = true, ["Interwiki redirect"] = true, ["SoftRedirect"] = true, ["Soft Redirect"] = true, ["Softredirect"] = true, ["Softredir"] = true, ["Soft link"] = true, ["Soft redir"] = true, ["Soft"] = true, ["Plain soft redirect"] = true, ["Softr"] = true }
